name: Lacera
description: In the practiced hands of a master, this blade and whip becomes exceedingly devastating.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: In the practiced hands of a master, this blade and whip becomes exceedingly devastating.

Soft metal used in microelectronics and energy weapons.

Location: Mars and Uranus

An amorphous solid. Possibly Orokin technology.

components.name: Rubedo

A jagged crystalline ore. Gives off radiant energy.

Location: Earth, Lua, Phobos, Europa, Pluto, Sedna, and the Void

patchlogs.name: Update 32.2.0: Lua’s Prey
patchlogs.changes: Fixed the Lacera dealing Toxin Damage instead of Electricity Damage on ground slams in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.6.0: Orphix Venom!
patchlogs.fixes:
Ceti Lacera Blueprint
Basmu and Ceti Lacera Blueprints are now tradeable.

patchlogs.name: Operation: Scarlet Spear: 27.3.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Sugatras being misaligned when equipped on the Lacera.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Update 27.2.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Lacera’s handle not fitting into Warframe’s hand when equipped with the Wisp animation set.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Update 23.2.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed numerous missing Whip (Mios, Lacera, etc) animations as reported here: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/989160-weapon-blade-and-whip-weapons-are-currently-broken-reduced-range-on-the-whip-sections-known/

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.8.0 + Hotfix 22.8.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Lacerate attackers with two razor sharp warfans.

patchlogs.name: Update 21: Chains of Harrow
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Lacera displaying incorrectly when posing in the Arsenal.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.8.2
patchlogs.fixes:
•    Fixed the Mios and Lacera whip going invisible when meleeing immediately after switching weapons.
•    Fixed the Mios and Lacera whip spazzing around erratically when switching weapons after performing a Quick Melee attack.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.0.6 + 18.0.6.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Lacera missing some weapon animations for Charge Attacks.
Fixed the Lacera displaying a whip dangle in each hand.

patchlogs.name: Update 18: The Second Dream
patchlogs.fixes: Lacera: In the practiced hands of a master this blade and whip weapon becomes exceedingly devastating.
